name: code-view
title: Code view
description: Render a source-code block with optional line numbers and per-line marks. A tiny built-in tokenizer tints keywords, strings, numbers, and comments for Go, JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, Rust, JSON, and Bash.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Stateless rendering primitive. Build a codeview.Block with Source, Language, ShowGutter, and a Marks map keyed by 1-based line number. Use MarkHighlight for the focus row, MarkAdded/MarkRemoved for diff hunks, MarkError/MarkWarning to call out a failing or risky line. Set MaxWidth>0 to truncate long lines with an ellipsis. The tokenizer is intentionally tiny — production syntax highlighting belongs in a chroma/tree-sitter wrapper component.
